category_sources: source_facts.description says Colima provides container runtimes on macOS and Linux; official README lists Docker, containerd, Incus, Kubernetes support.
display_name_sources: Official site and README use the project name Colima; source_facts.name is colima.
docs_sources: Official README links Website & Documentation to colima.run/docs; official docs page is dedicated documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/abiosoft/colima; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe container runtimes, Docker, Kubernetes, macOS/Linux, CLI, and VM-backed runtime support.
